shape.sparse_mla: enabled at S4096 with Triton SharedKV backend

source_change_summary.torchtitan_role_split_default: Native compact role split defaults to true, so dispatch and combine handles do not alias role-specific signal/staging state.
source_change_summary.forward_handle_reuse: Forward dispatch/combine MORI handles are reused for inverse autograd collectives and retained by one logical reference per inverse autograd consumer.
source_change_summary.keep_released_handles: Released handles remain cached by default to avoid MORI C++ handle destructor hipDeviceSynchronize in the normal perf path.
source_change_summary.launcher_heap_default: When CANARY_STANDARD_EP_COMPACT_COLLECTIVE_BACKEND=mori_native, the launcher now defaults MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE to 32G unless the caller overrides it.
source_change_summary.perf_scope: Handle lifetime and heap sizing only; no new row materialization, route-mask wrapper, token collective, per-row Python work, or per-token refcounting.

heap16.read: 16G is too small; native compact handle construction requested another aligned 8 GiB allocation from a 16 GiB heap.

heap32.read: Right-sized heap for the role-split/reused-forward-handle path in this six-step gate.

heap48.read: 48G over-reserves MORI heap and leaves too little headroom for the later FSDP reduce allocation.

launcher_note: The remote training log contains Training completed for all ranks. The local launcher command returned exit code 2 after completion with '.: filename argument required', so this is recorded as a launcher postamble issue rather than a training failure.

decision.stability: Native compact role split plus forward-handle reuse plus keep-released handles plus 32G heap clears the previous step-1/native-compact residency wall for a six-step sparse S4096 gate.
decision.throughput: Not promoted over the retained 20-step standard-EP baseline; the six-step window is still lower throughput, though lower memory.
decision.perf_safety: The fix is kept because it is a handle-lifetime/heap-sizing fix and does not introduce row-path latency mechanisms.
decision.next_action: Run a 20-step non-profiled native role-split/heap32 gate and profile only if the full-window throughput still trails.

validation: remote log confirmed clean sparse env and Training completed on all ranks
